landing.heroSubtitle: You have ideas that need ten people to execute. Now you only need yourself and Alook.
landing.youAreCEO: You're the CEO. Assign agents to roles — dev, ops, research — and let them coordinate. Define your org chart, and Alook keeps everyone in sync.
landing.traceableDesc: Agents communicate through email and work on your local machine. Every instruction, decision, and reply is recorded — in your inbox or in local files. Full accountability, no black boxes.
landing.showsUpOnTime: SHOWS UP AT THE RIGHT TIME
landing.calendarDesc: Your agent manages its own schedule. It knows when to work, when to follow up, and when to wait — always on time, never in the way.
landing.alwaysOnDesc: A persistent daemon keeps every agent running around the clock — picking up tasks, responding to emails, shipping work while you sleep.
landing.everyTaskSmarter: EVERY TASK MAKES THE TEAM SMARTER
landing.selfLearningDesc: Agents build memory from past work — decisions, preferences, context. Your company gets sharper with every conversation, every task, every day.
landing.bringYourOwnDesc: Alook is the orchestration layer. Pick the agents you trust — we give them roles, inboxes, and an always-on runtime.
landing.waitingServer: Waiting for server to be ready...
landing.copyAndPaste: Copy and Paste Into Your Agent's Chat to Get Started
landing.faqWhatIsAnswer: Alook is the orchestration layer for your personal company. It lets you define roles, assign AI agents, and keep them collaborating, always on, and self-learning — like running a company with an AI workforce.
landing.faqHowCommunicate: How do I communicate with my AI agents?
landing.faqHowCommunicateAnswer: Each agent gets its own @alook.ai email address. You can send instructions via email, and agents collaborate on tasks and reply. You can also manage your company through the Alook dashboard.
landing.faqFreeAnswer: Yes, Alook offers a free tier to get started with Your Personal Company.

dashboard.personalAssistantDesc: One AI that handles your everyday tasks and communications
dashboard.salesOutreachDesc: Prospect, follow up, and close deals as a team
dashboard.customerSupportDesc: Handle tickets, draft replies, and track resolutions
dashboard.customDesc: Build your own team from scratch
